name: iroha
description: Use native Torii MCP on deployed Iroha networks such as Taira for live account, asset, contract, governance, and transaction workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Use deployed Torii MCP endpoints for live Iroha app-development and network workflows
interface.longDescription: Use Iroha to work against deployed Torii MCP endpoints such as Taira, inspect accounts, assets, aliases, contracts, governance, and submit transaction-oriented workflows through the curated `iroha.*` tool surface exposed by native Torii MCP.
defaultPrompt: Inspect Taira accounts, aliases, and balances through Iroha MCP
Deploy or call a contract on a Torii MCP endpoint and wait for status
Query governance, subscriptions, or transaction status on a live Iroha network
